allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "web"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "web" | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "web/public/images/intro" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "web" -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq ".git" } | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---dirs---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "web/src" -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Resolve-Path "web"\).Path, ""\) })
PowerShell(cmd /c "cd web && npm install zustand framer-motion react-swipeable react-markdown remark-gfm clsx" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Test-Path "web\\public\\images\\intro"; Test-Path "web\\public\\images"; Test-Path "web\\public"; Get-ChildItem "web\\public" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Resolve-Path "web"\).Path, ""\) })
PowerShell(cmd /c "cd web && set PORT=3001 && npx next dev -p 3001 2>&1")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/slide/N1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match "想像してみてください"\) { Write-Output "TITLE_OK: N1 title rendered" } else { Write-Output "TITLE_MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "X薬の革新的な臨床効果"\) { Write-Output "VISUAL_OK" }; if \($r.Content -match "次へ"\) { Write-Output "NAV_OK" } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; Write-Output $_ })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/slide/N1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 300; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match "想像してみてください"\) { Write-Output "TITLE_OK" } else { Write-Output "TITLE_MISSING \(first 500 chars\):"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/slide/N1", "/slide/N3", "/slide/N4", "/slide/N6"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001$u" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 60 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$u  -> $\($r.StatusCode\)  len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $code = [int]$resp.StatusCode; $loc = $resp.Headers["Location"]; Write-Output "$u  -> $code  Location=$loc" } else { Write-Output "$u  -> ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } catch { Write-Output "$u  -> EXC $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
Bash(echo "Started dev server in background, pid=$!")
Read(//f/マイドライブ/2016年works/AI/作成アプリ/GRADEbook_CoreGRADE/grade-handbook-japanese-v2/coreGRADE/**)
Read(//f/マイドライブ/2016年works/AI/作成アプリ/GRADEbook_CoreGRADE/grade-handbook-japanese-v2/coreGRADE/paper/**)
